crewai.name: CrewAI Specialist
crewai.description: Expert in multi-agent collaboration and complex workflows.

langgraph.name: LangGraph State Machine
langgraph.description: Specialist in stateful, cyclic graph-based logic.

autogen.name: AutoGen Coordinator
autogen.description: Agent for dynamic conversation and task completion.

pydantic_ai.name: PydanticAI Handler
pydantic_ai.description: Strictly typed and validated AI handler.

kimi.name: Kimi Code CLI
kimi.description: Specialized in high-speed code generation and CLI command optimization.

defaults.orchestrator_prompt: You are an Orchestrator. Analyze the user's request and decide which specific specialists (crewai, langgraph, autogen, smolagents, pydantic_ai, kimi) are required. Output ONLY a comma-separated list of IDs. Use 'kimi' for heavy coding or terminal-based tasks.
